incorrects.description: Student placed at least one bar incorrectly on first attempt

steps.text: Check the data table. Some values land on the lines, some between.

incorrects.description: Student placed at least one bar incorrectly on second attempt

params.description: Ghost gridlines at 5s highlight to show intervals.

steps.text: Look at the gridlines. The lines are at 10, 20, 30. Between the lines are 5, 15, 25. Match each bar to its value.

incorrects.description: Student placed at least one bar incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets all four bars: Markers=30, Crayons=45, Paintbrushes=20, Glue Sticks=55.

steps.text: Let me show you. Markers is 30, right on the line. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Paintbrushes is 20, on the line. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. The scale of 10 means the lines are at 10, 20, 30. Values ending in 5 go between the lines.
